metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.6-beta.8
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Restores the neutral-black Dark mode as the default appearance. - Adds a deeper navy Heritage mode with Electric Cyan interactions. - Adds color pickers for the application frame base and accent colors. - Automatically derives readable surface hierarchy from a custom frame color. - Makes the About product card follow the active appearance.
